parsed.production_notes: The woman in the top panel is a static AI-generated image with slight, unnatural animation applied to her hair and breathing. The hand in the bottom panel is a stock asset composited over the text, moving in a repetitive, disconnected manner.

characters.appearance: Young woman with a fair complexion and long, wavy brown hair. She has soft facial features and a gentle gaze.
characters.wardrobe: White, off-the-shoulder top or dress with ruffled details.

scenes.setting: Abstract split-screen: top is a soft, intimate bedroom setting; bottom is a close-up of a book page.
scenes.camera: Split-screen: top is a medium close-up, bottom is a macro close-up.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman with long, wavy brown hair is lying down, resting her head on her hand. She has a fair complexion and is wearing a white, off-the-shoulder garment. The lighting is soft and warm, creating an intimate atmosphere. She looks directly at the viewer with a gentle expression. The background is slightly out of focus, showing soft furnishings.

A close-up of a human hand with a manicured fingernail pointing at a textured, off-white surface resembling a blank page of a book. The hand moves slightly, tapping different areas of the surface. The lighting is even and bright, focusing entirely on the hand and the texture of the page.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout. The top half shows a static, slightly animated image of a woman lying down. The bottom half shows a hand tapping on a page of text. As the hand taps specific words, pop-up boxes appear with translations. A banner at the very top contains promotional text in Ukrainian.

scenes.on_screen_text:
ВЧИ АНГЛІЙСЬКУ З КНИЖКАМИ ЛИШЕ ПО 10 ХВИЛИН НА ДЕНЬ (LEARN ENGLISH WITH BOOKS IN JUST 10 MINUTES A DAY)
Рекомендовано вчителями (Recommended by teachers)
Джон Клеланд (John Cleland)
Фанні Хілл. Мемуари жінки для втіх (Fanny Hill. Memoirs of a Woman of Pleasure)
Читай (Read) Слухай (Listen) Перекладай (Translate) +150 нових слів (+150 new words)
Come, my dear girl, there is nothing here that should frighten you.
But... what am I to do? I asked, trembling.
I stood before her in silence, my cheeks burning and my heart beating faster than ever before.
Though I could not yet understand the life she hinted at, I felt that the door behind me had already closed, and another—far more mysterious—was opening.
налякати (to frighten)
Знаю (I know) Вивчати (To study)
тремтіти (to tremble)
щока (cheek)
битися (to beat)
ще (yet)
натякати (to hint)
позаду (behind)
таємничий (mysterious)
